textByHash.211448399bbbde5ace7a440dbca34a01e34d1f13: True. We've not fallen on the best of times here.
textByHash.f0254536c83c2bef10d5d2204c6103bd382948e5: Possibly. I'd go talk to Awusah the Mayor of Nardah. He's in the big house on the east side of the town square.
textByHash.1cde6e32f12e9ace90e9625cea9ce263029b700e: Much better thanks to you. We're all very impressed.
